name: Excel spreadsheet to Markdown conversion
prompt: Convert this Excel file at ./data/budget.xlsx to markdown.
expected_behavior: Output all sheets as separate tables with sheet names
success_criteria: Preserves multiple sheets as labeled sections
Handles basic formatting (bold headers, merged cells) reasonably well
edge_cases: Complex Excel with formulas → outputs computed values, not formula text
Embedded charts/images → may not extract chart data accurately
Very large spreadsheet (>10k rows) → may be slow or produce unwieldy output
